name: Service Password Rotation Alert
description: Track service account password ages and alert when rotation is overdue. Enforces security policy compliance by notifying owners 7 and 1 days before the deadline.
author: platform

config.sql: SELECT service_name, owner_email, last_rotated_at, (last_rotated_at + rotation_interval_days * INTERVAL '1 day') AS rotation_due, (last_rotated_at + rotation_interval_days * INTERVAL '1 day') - NOW() AS days_remaining FROM service_credentials WHERE (last_rotated_at + rotation_interval_days * INTERVAL '1 day') BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days'

config.subject: Action Required: Rotate credentials for {{$item.value.service_name}}
config.html:
Credential Rotation Due

Service: {{$item.value.service_name}}

Rotation due: {{$item.value.rotation_due}}

Please rotate the credentials in your secrets manager and update the rotation date.
